title: Tidal Basin
summary: The operation against Black Tusk's principal Washington stronghold that ends with Division Agents recovering the stolen broad-spectrum antivirals.

claims.text: The official story recap identifies Tidal Basin as Black Tusk's main stronghold in Washington, D.C.
Division Agents take down the stronghold and recover the broad-spectrum antivirals.

paragraphs.text: Tidal Basin closes the first Black Tusk counteroffensive around the antiviral: Agents assault the faction's primary D.C. stronghold and retrieve the stolen supply.

verification.notes: The page records the official narrative outcome; encounters, objectives and collectibles still require direct game capture.
